{{CargoOrgan
|name=Boxer‘s Heart
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10945
|idx=139
|description=The only one who made 7 Demon Gods spit teeth, until Demon God No.8 brought a referee...
|skill=
|hp=2640
|def=255
|atk=244
|rush=307
|gene1=Each round, {race} RUSH +80
|gene2=Per organ implanted, all ELMT DMG +4
Organs Implanted: 40/40
|gene3=Restore 800 HP each round
|gene4=Each round, {race} ATK +80
|gene5=Each round, {race} DEF +80
|gene6=Healing +12%
|gene7=All ELMT DMG +2.4% (Awakened)
|}}
